---
title: "Advanced Economies Labor Market Dashboard"
subtitle: "Creating a dashboard that sources a range of LM data from different sources. "
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format: bgi-revealjs
---

## Overview

Short framing paragraph.

- Key [takeaway]{.emphasis} one
- Key [takeaway]{.emphasis} two

## Findings {.section-slide}

## First Finding

### Supporting sub-headline

- Point with [emphasis]{.emphasis}
- Point with [emphasis]{.emphasis}
